title: Highest Grossing Movie 2025 Odds: Minecraft Movie Now 2/1 After Box Office Smash
text:
Highest Grossing Movie 2025 Odds and analysis:

Current Odds:

Avatar: Fire and Ash - 4/9 (69.2% implied probability). Maintains its position as the overwhelming odds-on favorite due to the franchise's proven international appeal and box office track record.

A Minecraft Movie - 2/1 (33.3% implied probability). Has dramatically improved its position in the 2025 box office race. Betting odds slashed from 20/1 to just 2/1 following strong international performance. The film now presents a genuine challenge to the market favorite.

Ne Zha 2 - 6/1 (14.3% implied probability). Benefits from enormous Chinese box office success, having already generated over $1.8 billion globally.

Zootopia 2 - 6/1 (14.3% implied probability). Disney sequel remains a competitive option.

Wicked: For Good - 7/1 (12.5% implied probability).

Jurassic World: Rebirth - 7/1 (12.5% implied probability). Faces more cautious early expectations compared to previous installments.

Analysis: Avatar: Fire and Ash maintains its position as the overwhelming odds-on favorite due to the franchise's proven international appeal and box office track record. However, the Minecraft Movie's cross-generational appeal and word-of-mouth momentum have made it a serious contender. Ne Zha 2 benefits from enormous Chinese box office success. Disney sequels like Zootopia 2 and Wicked: For Good remain competitive options, while Jurassic World: Rebirth faces more cautious early expectations compared to previous installments.
